task_value.why: The ONLY scoring: two outcome metrics over AUTHORED tasks (agent-created tasks carry zero weight). COMPLETION = w*(progress + alpha*done)/(1+alpha) — did the work get done. EFFICIENCY = w*done*(horizon - done_at)/span — how early. Both are deltas over the null-agent baseline, normalized by the frictionless optimum (sim.optimal). Noise self-punishes through physics: meetings and chat interruptions consume capacity, completions land later, efficiency drops. No checks, no penalties, no keywords, no LLM judging — nothing for a policy to game except doing the work better.
